phaseHubDiscovery.jql: project = PDE AND issuetype = "Block Level Two" AND summary ~ "SEF Phase" ORDER BY rank ASC, key ASC

notes: Phase hubs discovered via phaseHubDiscovery JQL (or saved filter). Children are fetched by parent + issuetype. phaseHubKeys in manifest are optional fallbacks for scripts only. chartWindow is a fallback only; fetch computes the x-axis from live dates.
